chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 2203 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case. 23.12.2019. Mr. Muhammad Zainuddin Baloch, advocate for petitioner Mr. Samiullah Rind, advocate for respondent No.8 Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G Sindh. = At the very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that he would not press the disposal of instant petition before this Court on merit, if his department is directed to dispose of his application for possession of the Quarter allotted to him is disposed of within one month, which is not opposed by learned A.A.G and learned counsel for the respondent No.8. In view of above, the instant petition is disposed of as not pressed with direction to the official respondents to dispose of the application of the petitioner for possession of Quarter allotted to him within one month after receipt of this order, if it is lying with them by providing chance of hearing to all the concerned. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
